brief: PUT /bookmarks/:id does not run validateBookmark before saving. Sending url=123 (number) causes a crash instead of returning 400.
acceptance_criteria: PUT with invalid body returns 400 with validation errors
No crash or unhandled exception on malformed input
oracle_test: Create a bookmark. PUT with {url: 123, title: 456}. Expect 400, not 500 or crash.
